mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user) AS userCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recycle_order) AS orderCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total_count) FROM recycle_order), 0) AS batteryCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total_count) FROM recycle_order WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()), 0) AS todayCount

SELECT bt.id AS batteryTypeId, bt.type_name AS batteryTypeName, COALESCE(SUM(rd.battery_count), 0) AS totalCount FROM battery_type bt LEFT JOIN recycle_detail rd ON bt.id = rd.battery_type_id LEFT JOIN recycle_order ro ON rd.order_id = ro.id AND ro.order_status != 3 GROUP BY bt.id, bt.type_name ORDER BY totalCount DESC, bt.id ASC

SELECT DATE(ro.create_time) AS date, COUNT(ro.id) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(ro.total_count), 0) AS totalCount FROM recycle_order ro WHERE ro.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND ro.order_status != 3 GROUP BY DATE(ro.create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT YEAR(ro.create_time) AS year, MONTH(ro.create_time) AS month, COUNT(ro.id) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(ro.total_count), 0) AS totalCount FROM recycle_order ro WHERE ro.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) AND ro.order_status != 3 GROUP BY YEAR(ro.create_time), MONTH(ro.create_time) ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC

SELECT YEAR(ro.create_time) AS year, COUNT(ro.id) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(ro.total_count), 0) AS totalCount FROM recycle_order ro WHERE ro.order_status != 3 GROUP BY YEAR(ro.create_time) ORDER BY year ASC
SELECT order_status AS orderStatus, COUNT(*) AS count FROM recycle_order GROUP BY order_status

SELECT cityName, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_count), 0) AS totalCount, COALESCE(SUM(total_points), 0) AS totalPoints FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN recycle_address LIKE '%省%市%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(recycle_address, '省', -1), '市', 1) WHEN recycle_address LIKE '%市%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(recycle_address, '市', 1) ELSE recycle_address END AS cityName, total_count, total_points FROM recycle_order WHERE order_status != 3 AND recycle_address IS NOT NULL AND recycle_address != '' ) city_stat GROUP BY cityName ORDER BY totalCount DESC, orderCount DESC, cityName ASC LIMIT #{limit}
